- Planetary Gears | McMaster-Carr: Choose from our selection of planetary gears, including metal gears and gear racks, plastic gears and gear racks, and more. Same and Next Day Delivery.
- Planetgear (PGSTK) Parts & Kits - Rexnord: Planetgear (PGSTK) Parts & Kits Rexnord Planetgear Adapter Flanges
- IMS Gear: Customizable Planetary Gears for Every Industry Need: A planetary gear (also: epicyclic gear) is a technical design that serves as a "link" for power transmission between a drive source (the motor) and an application to be moved (e.g. the movement of a wheel).

- IMS Gear: Customizable Planetary Gears for Every Industry Need: Our modular system makes your planetary gear come true - worldwide, quick, in large and small quantities, cost-efficient and with some extra personal service. Only available from IMS Gear.

- Planetary Gearbox Calculator - procalclab.com: Planetary gear calculator is a compact online tool that delivers immediate kinematic and load estimates for epicyclic gear trains. The utility computes gear ratios for three standard operating modes, returns output speed and torque, gives simple tangential force estimates on gear bodi
build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(50, 50, 12)

STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(5).cutThruAll()

STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=12).rect(40, 40).extrude(2)

STEP 4: Create planet pin holes — 
    a. .workplane(offset=6).circle(18).centered().polyline([(0, -17), (15, 0), (0, 17)]).close().cutThruAll()
    b. .workplane(offset=6).circle(18).centered().polyline([(-15, 0), (0, 17), (0, -17)]).close().cutThruAll()
    c. .workplane(offset=6).circle(18).centered().polyline([(0, -17), (-15, 0), (0, 17)]).close().cutThruAll()
